title: Increase the timeout for metalinter from 2m to 4m
body:
Increase the timeout that we set for running the metalinter from 2 minutes to 4 minutes, for cases where the calling environment is more heavily loaded than we expected.

As of this writing, this appears to be what's causing CI to reject #117.

comments.body: LGTM, just wondering if we should just bump it to 10 minutes to be extra safe.
We might have to eventually, though I'm told that speediness is desirable for CI tests, so if we get to that point we might have to make other tradeoffs.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/b92279faa4d754dd137958eb7af765591db28b34.1495559490525118464/index.html)
Approved by: rhatdan
Pushing b92279faa4d754dd137958eb7af765591db28b34 to master...
